specific_question: What percentage of legacy sales data had been migrated to the new 2024 CRM platform?
answer: As of February 15, 2024, the Sales Operations team of Elexion Automotive had migrated 100% of legacy sales data into the new CRM platform.
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
